decoder.name: phishing-lab-gophish-email-sent
decoder.regex: ^time="([^"]+)" level=info msg="Email sent" email="[^"]* <([^&]+)>" envelope_from="[^"]* <([^&]+)>" smtp_from=([^\s]+)

decoder.name: phishing-lab-dovecot-lmtp-save
decoder.regex: dovecot\[[0-9]+\]: lmtp\(([^)]+)\)<[^&]+>: msgid=<([^&]+)>: saved mail to INBOX

decoder.name: phishing-lab-dovecot-imap-login
decoder.regex: dovecot\[[0-9]+\]: imap-login: Login: user=<([^&]+)>, method=([^,]+), rip=([0-9.]+), lip=([0-9.]+)
